# Milestone Energym
Milestone Energym is a premium fitness center located in Barmer, Rajasthan. We offer state-of-the-art equipment, certified trainers, CrossFit, Yoga, and Personal Training.

## Services
- Personal Training
- Functional Training
- CrossFit
- Yoga
- Diet & Nutrition Counseling

## Contact
Phone: +91 8875305442
Email: Milestonenergym@gmail.com
Address: Near Crown Plaza NH68 Jaisalmer Road Barmer, Barmer, Rajasthan-344001
